properties.name: jp.ecuacion.tool.command-api.allow-insecure-access
properties.description: When true, GET requests to executeScript are allowed and POST requests skip apiKey verification (intended for trusted internal networks). Defaults to false (secure) when unset; leaving it unset is logged as a warning at startup.

properties.name: jp.ecuacion.tool.command-api.api-key-file-path
properties.description: Path to the file containing the shared secret compared against the 'apiKey' POST parameter of executeScript. Supports ${ENV_VAR} resolution.
